title: Android
text: Home * Software * Android Android robot Android , a mobile device operating system based on the Linux kernel , with middleware , libraries and APIs written in C , and applications running on a framework including Java-compatible libraries based on Apache Harmony . Android is developed by the Open Handset Alliance led by Google Inc. [1] .
